column36:
I don't do day-tradings, but rather value investing with some basic trading. Therefore, I need some good chart basics, but also an overview over geo-politics and other external market factors, some industry news and upcoming publishings (like unemployment rates in the US or announcements of Kevin Walsh...). My decisions are mostly based on my trust in the market chances I see for those companies. I invest at NYSE including option trading). 
My sources are regularly Markus Koch, Ticker Symbol:YOU, Bernecker TV and Mario Lochner on YouTube  next to Handelsblatt, Trading view and other news.
